glosses.ja: 隔離する; 断熱する

sentences.target: J'isole cette fenêtre avec de la mousse.
sentences.reading: /ʒ‿izɔl sɛt fənɛtʁ avɛk də la mus/

translations.fr: J'isole cette fenêtre avec de la mousse.
translations.ipa: /ʒ‿izɔl sɛt fənɛtʁ avɛk də la mus/
translations.en: I’m insulating this window with foam.
translations.es: Estoy aislando esta ventana con espuma.
translations.de: Ich dämme dieses Fenster mit Schaum.
translations.it: Sto isolando questa finestra con la schiuma.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在用泡沫给这扇窗做隔热。
translations.yue: 我用發泡膠幫呢扇窗做隔熱。
translations.pt: Estou isolando esta janela com espuma.
translations.he: אני מבודד את החלון הזה עם קצף.
translations.vi: Tôi đang cách nhiệt cửa sổ này bằng bọt xốp.
translations.nl: Ik isoleer dit raam met schuim.
translations.hi: मैं इस खिड़की को फोम से इन्सुलेट कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Μονώνω αυτό το παράθυρο με αφρό.
translations.nb: Jeg isolerer dette vinduet med skum.
translations.id: Saya sedang mengisolasi jendela ini dengan busa.
translations.sv: Jag isolerar det här fönstret med skum.
translations.da: Jeg isolerer dette vindue med skum.
translations.ja: この窓をフォームで断熱しています。

tokens.explanation: Finite verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; includes clitic subject pronoun je elided to j' before a vowel-initial verb; main predicate of the clause.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, agreeing with the noun fenêtre it modifies.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb isole.
Preposition introducing an instrumental/manner prepositional phrase.
Preposition forming part of the partitive construction de la; introduces the noun phrase.
Definite article used with de to form the partitive de la; feminine singular agreeing with mousse.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition avec within the partitive phrase avec de la mousse (unspecified quantity).

sentences.target: On isole ce mur avant l'hiver.

translations.fr: On isole ce mur avant l'hiver.
translations.en: We’re insulating this wall before winter.
translations.es: Estamos aislando esta pared antes del invierno.
translations.de: Wir dämmen diese Wand, bevor der Winter kommt.
translations.it: Stiamo isolando questo muro prima dell'inverno.
translations.ko: 겨울이 오기 전에 이 벽을 단열하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在冬天之前给这面墙做保温。
translations.yue: 我哋喺冬天之前為呢幅牆做隔熱。
translations.ru: Мы утепляем эту стену перед зимой.
translations.pt: Estamos isolando esta parede antes do inverno.
translations.he: אנחנו מבודדים את הקיר הזה לפני החורף.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang cách nhiệt bức tường này trước mùa đông.
translations.ar: نحن نعزل هذا الجدار قبل الشتاء.
translations.nl: We isoleren deze muur voor de winter.
translations.uk: Ми утеплюємо цю стіну перед зимою.
translations.hu: Szigeteljük ezt a falat a tél előtt.
translations.hi: हम सर्दियों से पहले इस दीवार को इन्सुलेट कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Μονώνουμε αυτόν τον τοίχο πριν από τον χειμώνα.
translations.nb: Vi isolerer denne veggen før vinteren.
translations.id: Kami sedang mengisolasi dinding ini sebelum musim dingin.
translations.sv: Vi isolerar den här väggen innan vintern.
translations.ro: Izolăm acest perete înainte de iarnă.
translations.da: Vi isolerer denne væg før vinteren.
translations.ja: 冬になる前にこの壁を断熱しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun, grammatically 3rd person singular; subject of isole.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with on; main verb.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying mur.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of isole.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Noun with elided definite article (l' from le before a silent h); masculine singular; complement of the preposition avant.

sentences.target: Je veux isoler le mur du salon.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø izɔle lə myʁ dy salɔ̃/

translations.fr: Je veux isoler le mur du salon.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø izɔle lə myʁ dy salɔ̃/
translations.en: I want to insulate the living room wall.
translations.es: Quiero aislar la pared del salón.
translations.it: Voglio isolare la parete del soggiorno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想给客厅的墙做保温。
translations.yue: 我想為客廳嘅牆做隔熱。
translations.ru: Я хочу утеплить стену в гостиной.
translations.pt: Quero isolar a parede da sala de estar.
translations.he: אני רוצה לבודד את הקיר של הסלון.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn cách nhiệt bức tường phòng khách.
translations.nl: Ik wil de muur van de woonkamer isoleren.
translations.uk: Я хочу утеплити стіну у вітальні.
translations.hi: मैं लिविंग रूम की दीवार को इन्सुलेट करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να μονώσω τον τοίχο του σαλονιού.
translations.nb: Jeg vil isolere veggen i stuen.
translations.id: Saya ingin mengisolasi dinding ruang tamu.
translations.sv: Jag vill isolera väggen i vardagsrummet.
translations.ro: Vreau să izolez peretele din sufragerie.
translations.cs: Chci izolovat zeď v obývacím pokoji.
translations.da: Jeg vil isolere væggen i stuen.
translations.ja: リビングの壁を断熱したいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; subject of veux.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; catenative/volitional verb taking an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of veux; denotes the intended action.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing mur.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of isoler.
Fused form of preposition de + definite article le; introduces a noun complement specifying which wall (genitive-like relation).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of du; specifies the location/possessor.

sentences.target: Ils isolent la chambre de Léo.

translations.fr: Ils isolent la chambre de Léo.
translations.es: Están aislando el dormitorio de Leo.
translations.it: Stanno isolando la camera di Leo.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在给莱奥的卧室做保温。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺度為Leo嘅睡房做隔熱。
translations.pt: Eles estão isolando o quarto do Leo.
translations.he: הם מבודדים את החדר של ליאו.
translations.vi: Họ đang cách nhiệt phòng ngủ của Leo.
translations.hi: वे लियो के बेडरूम को इन्सुलेट कर रहे हैं.
translations.id: Mereka sedang mengisolasi kamar tidur Leo.
translations.ja: 彼らはレオの寝室を断熱しています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun (masculine or mixed); subject of isolent.
Present indicative, 3rd person plural; main predicate.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing chambre.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of isolent.
Preposition introducing a noun complement (possessive/origin relation).
Proper noun; complement of the preposition de indicating whose room.
